prestazioni: Full bolt-on turbo system for the S58B30T0 engine featuring a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger with a 0.82 A/R turbine housing, custom 3.5-inch titanium downpipe with 200-cell catalytic converters, and a CSF intercooler with a 1,200 horsepower core rating, paired with a Motec M150 ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping to handle 750 horsepower on E85 fuel

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression), custom valving for the G80 M3 chassis, and helper springs for optimized weight transfer during aggressive cornering, paired with MCS GT4-inspired spherical bearing top mounts for razor-sharp steering response

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a Wavetrac limited-slip differential with a 3.15 final drive ratio, a GForce Engineering carbon fiber driveshaft, and a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 twin-disc clutch with a billet steel flywheel, designed to handle the increased torque from the turbo setup while maintaining OEM-like pedal feel
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit for the G80 M3, featuring carbon fiber front fenders with aggressive 30mm flares, a custom rear bumper with integrated diffuser, and a GT3-style rear wing with adjustable carbon fiber elements for downforce tuning, all finished in a custom matte BMW Frozen Portimao Blue with gloss black accents

CSF Motorsports front splitter with a 3D-printed aluminum support brace, paired with a custom rear diffuser from 3D Carbon featuring integrated brake cooling ducts and a gurney flap for high-speed stability, all designed to work with the Ohlins suspension for optimal aero balance at 150+ mph

Full interior overhaul with a Recaro Pole Position carbon fiber bucket seat set (FIA 8862-2009 certified), a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with Alcantara and carbon fiber construction, and a custom roll cage from Autopower Industries with integrated harness bars for track-day safety, all wrapped in a custom BMW Individual Merino leather and Alcantara upholstery with contrast stitching in Sakhir Orange
